message:
fix: derive latestMinor dynamically from cluster versions instead of hardcoding (#3706)

Replace the hardcoded `latestMinor = 33` in UpgradeStatus with a
`deriveLatestMinor()` function that computes the value from the highest
minor version observed across all clusters (+1). Falls back to 33 when
no cluster version data is available.

Closes #3671

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
